name: api-lifecycle
description: End-to-end API design and development tool — from natural language requirements to production-ready code
author: claude-session-status

skills.name: api-design

commands.name: api-design
commands.description: Design an OpenAPI spec from natural language requirements

commands.description: Generate types, handlers, client SDK, and docs from an OpenAPI spec

commands.name: api-test
commands.description: Generate integration and contract tests for API endpoints

agents.name: schema-designer
agents.description: Designs OpenAPI schemas and validates against best practices

agents.name: api-generator
